About Us

Cycle for a Happy & Healthy Lifestyle

Rent A Cycle is Islamabad's favourite cycle rental service, offering high-end road bikes to explore the city's gorgeous avenues, trails, and parks.

Whether you're a fitness enthusiast, a weekend adventurer, or just want to experience Islamabad differently — we've got the perfect ride for you.

  • 3 high-end road cycles available
  • Pre-booking only — reserve 24hrs in advance
  • Pay via Bank, Easypaisa or Cash
  • Refund available if unsatisfied
  • Original CNIC required at pickup

Pricing & Conditions

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Pricing List

Cycle TypeRate / DayDescription
Road Bike$10PKR equiv. accepted

💳 Pay via Bank Transfer, Easypaisa, or Cash at pickup.

Other Conditions

Pre-booking required at least 24 hours in advance to avoid any hassle.
All prices are final — no negotiations.
No pick & drop service. Separate charges apply if needed.
Original CNIC / ID card must be submitted at the time of pickup.
Refund available if you are not satisfied with the service.
Follow safety rules. Rent A Cycle is not responsible for unforeseen events or personal injury.

Golden Hour Awaits You

Join hundreds of riders exploring Islamabad at sunrise, sunset & everything in between.

WhatsApp to Book — 0310-5045267
